summary: Iteration 9: P1 Module Interactivity Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Tuendi rides/deliveries completion correctly awards points, creates wallet transactions, and sends notifications. Restaurant order delivery also awards points with notifications.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user maria@tudoaqui.ao
✅ POST /api/tuendi/rides - creates a ride with simulated driver (name, phone assigned)
✅ PATCH /api/tuendi/rides/{ride_id}/status - set to 'completed' awards points to user
✅ Ride completion creates wallet transaction (payment type, negative amount)
✅ Ride completion sends notification ('Corrida Concluída!' with points earned)
✅ POST /api/tuendi/deliveries - creates a delivery with driver assignment
✅ PATCH /api/tuendi/deliveries/{delivery_id}/status - set to 'completed' awards points
✅ POST /api/tuendi/chat/send - sends chat message to ride/delivery
✅ GET /api/tuendi/chat/{ride_id} - retrieves chat messages for ride
✅ POST /api/orders - creates restaurant order
✅ PATCH /api/orders/{order_id}/status - set to 'entregue' awards points
✅ Order delivery creates notification ('Pedido Entregue!' with points)
✅ GET /api/auth/me - verifies points increased after all completions
✅ GET /api/notifications/ - returns completion notifications
✅ Frontend: Tuendi home shows Viagem/Entrega tabs
✅ Frontend: Tuendi home shows all vehicle types (TuendiMoto, Tuendi, TuendiComfort, TuendiBlack)
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows updated points (226 points after test completions)
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows tier (Bronze) with progress bar
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows Carteira, Pontos, Pedidos stats
✅ Frontend: Notifications page shows 5 notifications including ride/delivery/order completions
critical_code_review_comments: Points calculation: max(1, price // 50) - 1 point per 50 Kz spent, minimum 1 point
All completion flows (ride, delivery, order) follow same pattern: update status → award points → create wallet txn → send notification
Notifications stored in 'notifications' collection (shared by all modules)
Driver assignment is MOCKED/SIMULATED with random selection from predefined list
seed_data_creation: Test rides, deliveries, orders created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Module interactivity fully verified. Ride/delivery/order completion flows working: status update to 'completed'/'entregue' → points awarded → wallet transaction created → notification sent. User maria@tudoaqui.ao has 226 points and 4 orders. Chat send/get endpoints working. Driver assignment is simulated (not real API). All notifications visible on /notifications page.

mocked_apis.note: Driver assignment is simulated, bank accounts are example data
mocked_apis_list: Driver assignment (random names/phones from SIMULATED_DRIVERS list)

on_completion: Wallet transaction created (type: payment, negative amount)

features: Send message with ride_id or delivery_id
is_driver flag for driver vs user messages
